title: Duba Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Duba with a Z-Score of +4.14. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Duba is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 45%, and the wind speed is 17.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city is experiencing no Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating the extreme warmth.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
